object_a.label: lamp
object_a.description: table lamp with white/cream fabric shade on side table
object_a.long_form_open_description: A traditional table lamp with a tapered white/cream fabric shade and a metallic or ceramic base sits on the side table. The lamp casts a warm, soft halo of light on the nearby wall, suggesting it may be on. The shade has subtle pleating and the base is partially obscured by other objects.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: On the side table, immediately left of the thermostat and light switch on the wall; partially behind the potted plant.

object_b.label: lamp
object_b.description: table lamp with white shade on left end table
object_b.long_form_open_description: Traditional table lamp with a white fabric shade and a light-colored base, providing soft illumination; sits on the left end table next to the sofa and above a potted plant.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Sits on the left end table, between the sofa and the first stair riser
